case_title: TROCHE, KENNETH vs. I. MAGNUM DEPARTMENT STORE et al

docket_entries.description: GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROCHE, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT I. MAGNUM DEPARTMENT STORE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-12-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-23-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-12-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON APR-12-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-12-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-12-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-12-1995 CONTINUED FROM MAY-12-1995 TO JUN-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF TROCHE, KENNETH
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROCHE, KENNETH
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-12-1995, CONTINUED TO SEP-11-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 TO ALLOW DEFT. TIME TO RESPOND. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROCHE, KENNETH SERVED JUL-10-1995, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT I. MAGNUM DEPARTMENT STORE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-11-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-11-1995, WHY NO DISMISSAL HAS BEEN FILED; AND WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER ACTION. HEARING SET FOR OCT-11-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-11-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-11-1995, 4TH OSC FOR PLAINTIFF: CARTER A. BEAVERS PRESENCE MANDATORY ON 10/25/95. (CONFLICT DOES NOT CONSTITUTE GOOD CAUSE FOR NOT APPEARING) HEARING SET FOR OCT-25-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-25-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. HEARING SET FOR DEC-14-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-14-1995, OFF CALENDAR
